English: May I ask, what is your surname?

Simplified: 我姓张，我叫张明。你叫什么名字？
Traditional: 我姓張，我叫張明。你叫什麼名字？
Pinyin: Wǒ xìng Zhāng, wǒ jiào Zhāng Míng. Nǐ jiào shén me míng zì?
English: My surname is Zhang. My name is Zhang Ming. What is your name?

Simplified: 我叫李华。你知道他是谁吗？
Traditional: 我叫李華。你知道他是誰嗎？
Pinyin: Wǒ jiào Lǐ Huá. Nǐ zhī dào tā shì shéi ma?
English: My name is Li Hua. Do you know who he is?

Simplified: 他是我的弟弟张强，来自中国香港。
Traditional: 他是我的弟弟張強，來自中國香港。
Pinyin: Tā shì wǒ de dì di Zhāng Qiáng, lái zì Zhōng guó Xiāng gǎng.
English: He is my younger brother, Zhang Qiang, from Hong Kong, China.
